title: "Regarding the US Safeguard Measure on Crystalline Silicon Photovoltaic Cells
bodyHtml:
According to a letter received from the Ministry of Trade, it has been reported that the United States has notified the World Trade Organization (WTO) about the inclusion of "bifacial panels" in the existing safeguard measures applied to the import of "crystalline silicon photovoltaic cells" (classified under tariff headings 8501.31, 8501.61, 8507.20, and 8541.40).

The Presidential Decree and the WTO notification related to this issue can be accessed through the links provided.
